_comment: Ground-movement and turn-timing constants for Mutants & Masterminds 4e (Open Game Content). Numeric game-mechanical facts only. Consumed by mm_companion.core.data_loader; core reads these rather than hardcoding movement rules in Python. A character's walking / dashing / running speeds are the measurements-table distance at speed rank + [walkRankStep, dashRankStep, runRankStep]; roundSeconds converts a per-round distance to km/h.
